questions.statement: Which of the following statements about the Council of Ministers is correct?
options: Ministers of State rank higher than Cabinet Ministers. /
Cabinet Ministers are a smaller group within the Council of Ministers. /
The Council of Ministers is appointed by the Chief Justice /
All members of the Council of Ministers are part of the Cabinet. /

questions.statement:
What is India’s rank in the 2025 Human Development Report?
2025 की मानव विकास रिपोर्ट में भारत का रैंक क्या है?
What is the total route length of the Indian Railways (as of March 2020)?

Who is the richest Chief Minister in India according to the ADR report of 2025?
2025 की एडीआर रिपोर्ट के अनुसार, भारत में सबसे अमीर मुख्यमंत्री कौन है?
options: N. Chandrababu Naidu / एन. चंद्रबाबू नायडू

questions.statement: How many Ati Vishisht Seva Medals (AVSM) and Param Vishisht Seva Medals (PVSM) have been approved by the President of India on the eve of the 77th Republic Day?

Which treaty was suspended by Pakistan in retaliation to India's withdrawal from the Indus Waters Treaty?
सिंधु जल संधि से भारत के हटने के जवाब में पाकिस्तान ने कौन सी संधि निलंबित कर दी थी?
Who is the author of the book &quot;India@2047: Charts Roadmap to Global Economic Leadership&quot;?

The Senkaku/Diaoyu Islands have been a source of conflict between which countries ?
सेनकाकू/दियाओयू द्वीप समूह किन देशों के बीच विवाद का स्रोत रहा है?
options: Morocca and Algeria / मोरक्को और अल्जीरिया
Ethiopia and Somalia / इथोपिया और सोमालिया
Angola and Zambia / अंगोला और जाम्बिया
Japan and China / जापान और चीन

questions.statement: <p>In India, which authority conducts the independent technical investigation of civil aircraft accidents?</p>
options: Directorate General of Civil Aviation, which regulates flight safety and airworthiness /
Airports Authority of India, which manages airports and air navigation services /
Bureau of Civil Aviation Security, which oversees aviation security measures /
Aircraft Accident Investigation Bureau, which investigates air crashes /

questions.statement: What is the name of Iran&rsquo;s two-day missile drill launched in the Indian Ocean and Sea of Oman?
